textByHash.1944ac42fda73e399a70f877e23aa7d5a340957b: My best guess would be using magic. Unfortunately Merlin is our magic expert.
textByHash.3ac9c64219e896a129aabbc2d12036d5c2e6be33: King Arthur will let you know. I believe he has a quest at the moment.
textByHash.4a074b38a1e37b288233ed57332b8d17dfb08ce9: Greetings to the court of King Arthur!
textByHash.69f6c0b7ba6552bd2f55f05285ba9dc4a980bf88: Sir Kay and I noticed a grate high up on the wall that leads to the small docks at the back of the keep, but it's too high up to reach and we couldn't figure out a way to boost our height.
textByHash.773cdd54e15f7843416fc88b04a8b5d79f7865b9: You are a very talented Knight indeed to have freed Merlin so quickly. You have all of our gratitude.
textByHash.783d45b84f5b5f26b9e6317f06189f72cc257a60: How are you going to get all of us out of here?
textByHash.7c009c6678e8b6c23acee13f50313cfba5b716a0: My best guess would be some sort of magic. Unfortunately Merlin is our magic expert.
textByHash.8d632b2a839eaa3168f8d80dace1b0583b8841e1: My best guess would be some sort of spell. Unfortunately Merlin is our magic expert.
textByHash.939a89e183ff4eabe86c2b3dccba6cc0acb4a3ea: How could this have happened to us?
textByHash.9d0648fb19fc99bd328f61c1652979997b22502a: I am proud to have you as a member of the Round Table.
textByHash.a68513c5be6a8f3852e934ff23c574e56acbd173: My best guess would be some sort of spell. Merlin is our magic expert. Ask him?
textByHash.b30b0be705aacf394c57f4cf70855f648c4ed275: I'm afraid not. He left here many moons ago and I know not where he went.
textByHash.cb12ca80e707dd19ad849a0565d51503c09c7463: Greetings, brave knight. I believe you should speak to Merlin, he probably has need of your assistance.
textByHash.e6752edea910a6ddf839826d442618fee6dd03d0: Although having said that, I believe Galahad found its location once...
